category_sources: source_facts.description says it interconverts numbers, Unicode, and HTML/XHTML entities; official Fourmilab page describes the same utility.
display_name_sources: Official Fourmilab page title uses unum; source_facts.name is unum.
docs_sources: Official Fourmilab homepage contains installation notes, version information, bug reporting, and usage context, making it the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official Fourmilab unum page says source code is maintained on and downloadable from https://github.com/Fourmilab/unum; source_facts.repo is empty so repo was researched.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Unicode, HTML/XHTML entity, and number conversion; official Fourmilab page notes the self-contained Perl source and Unicode/HTML tables.
